# Pinned dependencies for mutation-weekly workflow (hash-verified).
#
# Regenerate the hash after bumping the version:
#   pip download --no-deps PyYAML==6.0.2
#   sha256sum PyYAML-6.0.2-cp312-*.whl
#
# Only the Ubuntu 24.04 + CPython 3.12 manylinux_2_17 wheel is required
# because the mutation-weekly runner pins `runs-on: ubuntu-24.04`.
PyYAML==6.0.2 \
    --hash=sha256:80bab7bfc629882493af4aa31a4cfa43a4c57c83813253626916b8c7ada83476
